{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Advocate Headquarters
| introduced = The Pilot
}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Advocate Headquarters]] was destroyed during a battle with [[Starhammer]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c8">''The Pilot'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
